title: WIP: Add CentOS 7 RPM build tests

comments.body:
Not sure how others feel about including CentOS 7 RPM build tests. @rhatdan, @TomSweeneyRedHat, are you OK for me to add this alongside the Fedora 27/28 RPM build tests?

If you're happy to add, I will merge this PoC into the rpm.bats test file.
@pixdrift We will test on any distribution.  Buildah should be independent of Distros.
